A COLONIAL MANSION
IN THE HISTORIC CENTER OF CUSCO

Our Hotel

A STAY THAT PLACES YOU IN THE HEART OF CUSCO

ABOUT US

TERRA ANDINA
COLONIAL MANSION

A colonial mansion in the historic district of the ancient capital of the Inca Empire, Cusco, Peru. Terra Andina Colonial Mansion is a first-class hotel located half a block from the charming Plaza San Pedro, the San Pedro Market (designed by Eiffel), the Church of San Pedro and only four blocks from Cusco's Main Square.

  • It is the perfect starting point to make your visit to Cusco and Machu Picchu an unforgettable experience.
  • Our friendly and professional staff awaits you to guarantee you a pleasant stay.
